name: Qualified Order Exception for Structured Settlement Factoring

eligibility.description: The transfer must be approved in advance by a final order from an applicable State court finding the transfer is in the best interest of the payee and does not contravene any statutes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids a 40% excise tax on the factoring discount of a structured settlement payment rights transfer by obtaining a qualified state court order.
